title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kinemon, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kiku as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
